rationale: The response exists as prose guidance but omits the mandatory specification structure (no acceptance criteria, no invariants, no test conditions) required by the lean-doc-quality rubric.
rubric_evidence: "A good template is: 'In population P, under condition C, increasing X by amount a changes Y by amount b within time T.'"
"H0: μtreatment − μcontrol = 0 and H1: μtreatment − μcontrol > 0"
